summary: Frontend smoke test for new Brand Carousel section on home page + regression check. All smoke test items PASS. 12 brand cards render with correct data-testids, subtitles, brand color backdrops, working scroll arrows, click-through navigation to /products?search={brand}, and intact bottom note. Regression: hero, Drink Reveal, floating WhatsApp pill, customer + staff login all working.

issues: Review request describes BrandCarousel placement as 'between How It Works / Drink Reveal and Tier Rewards', but actual placement in Home.js is between 'Popular Drops' (Featured Products) and 'Tier Rewards'. The 'How It Works' section appears AFTER Tier Rewards. Order is: Hero -> CategoryChips -> MyFlashSales -> DrinkReveal -> FlashSales -> Popular Drops -> BrandCarousel -> Tier Rewards -> How It Works -> CTA. Not a functional issue; just confirm with product owner that this is the intended position.

action_items: Confirm with product owner that BrandCarousel placement (between 'Popular Drops' and 'Tier Rewards') matches the intended design; review request copy mentioned a slightly different position.
critical_code_review_comments: BrandCarousel.js is clean, well-structured, and self-contained (~115 lines). Good separation of concerns and uses the existing /products?search= contract — no backend changes required.

data-testid generation strategy (brand.short -> lowercased -> non-alphanumerics to '-') is robust. Produces 'brand-card-jack-d-s' and 'brand-card-mo-t' which is acceptable but worth noting these are autogenerated and may surprise future test authors. Consider adding an explicit `testid` field per brand for stability.

Scroll arrows are hidden below md breakpoint (md:flex). Mobile users have no scroll affordance other than horizontal swipe — fine given snap-x but worth a small visual hint (e.g., fade-out on right edge) for discoverability.
Bottom note text uses '·' separators wrapped in white/15 spans — they collapse on narrow widths (flex-wrap is on). Acceptable.
All brand cards use Link with proper React Router navigation and encodeURIComponent for the search param — verified working with Johnnie Walker -> /products?search=Johnnie%20Walker.
test_credentials: customer1@test.com / Test123! (works, displays 'Ahmad Test' in header), sam@masterliqours.my / Staff123! (works, displays 'Sam' in header)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Brand Carousel smoke test complete. 12 brand cards verified with testids: brand-card-walker, brand-card-chivas, brand-card-jack-d-s, brand-card-hennessy, brand-card-heineken, brand-card-absolut, brand-card-bombay, brand-card-bacardi, brand-card-tiger, brand-card-carlsberg, brand-card-mo-t, brand-card-don-julio. Container testid is brand-carousel. Right scroll arrow scrolls ~472px (close to spec 480). Click navigation appends ?search=<URL-encoded brand name>. Hero displays 4 unrelated 401 console errors (likely /api/me when unauthenticated) — pre-existing, not regression. Section placement is between 'Popular Drops' and 'Tier Rewards', slightly different from review request wording (which said between 'How It Works'/'Drink Reveal' and 'Tier Rewards').
